query:
SELECT id, title, 
  CASE WHEN fileUrl IS NOT NULL AND fileUrl != '' THEN 'HAS_URL' ELSE 'NO_URL' END as has_url,
  LEFT(fileUrl, 50) as url_preview
FROM secure_documents 
WHERE title IN (
  SELECT title FROM secure_documents GROUP BY title HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
ORDER BY title, id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute SELECT id, title, 
  CASE WHEN fileUrl IS NOT NULL AND fileUrl != '' THEN 'HAS_URL' ELSE 'NO_URL' END as has_url,
  LEFT(fileUrl, 50) as url_preview
FROM secure_documents 
WHERE title IN (
  SELECT title FROM secure_documents GROUP BY title HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
ORDER BY title, id;
